objective: Stratégie de Breakout sur ALGOUSDC 5m. Indicateurs : DONCHIAN + ICHIMOKU + ATR. Entrée sur cassure de la bande supérieure/inférieure de DONCHIAN avec volume confirmé. Sortie si le prix réintègre le range ou trailing stop basé sur ATR. Stop serré 1.0x ATR pour limiter le drawdown, TP à 2.9x ATR.

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy is based on the use of Bollinger Bands, Ichimoku Cloud and ATR for trade entry. When price breaks above the upper band of the Bollinger Band, RSI crosses above 50% level and ADX shows an upward trend, a long position is taken if the stop loss is placed below 1.5 times ATR from the entry point with take profit at 3 times ATR distance from the entry point.
Bollinger Breakout with ADX trend filter reduces false signals in ranging markets.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is based on Bollinger Breakout with ADX trend filter, Donchian Channel, Ichimoku Cloud and ATR indicators. The backtest has not yet run but it could suffer from false signals in ranging markets due to the use of ADX as a trend filter. Potential weaknesses also include high stop loss distance leading to large drawdowns and mediocre Sharpe ratio resulting from moderate returns and higher volatility.
[Backup plan] 1) Increase the number of bars backtested to gather more data and reduce noise 2) Adjust trailing stop based on Donchian Channel width, decreasing it as market conditions become tighter 3) Test different trend filters such as CCI or ROC instead of ADX. If results are poor (negative return), focus on optimizing entry criteria with additional indicators like RSI or Volume Weighted Average Price (VWAP). If results are mediocre (low Sharpe), test increasing the period of Ichimoku Cloud base line and testing different stop loss distance and trailing stop based on market conditions.
